MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Daniel P. Muino, Esq. of GIBSON, DUNN & CRUTCHER LLP 393-8200 for defendant MEADWESTVACO CORPORATION moving FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Paul Vaillancourt, Esq. of BRAYTON PURCELL 898-1555 opposing party
Mr. Vaillancourt appeared to oppose the Court's granting of summary judgment. No opposition was filed by counsel. He represented in open court that there was a prior agreement between the parties to dismiss with a mutual waiver of costs. He claimed that Plaintiffs FAXed him a dismissal with prejudice. He contests the with prejudice part. The Court adopted its tentative ruling on the ground that no written opposition was filed and informed counssel that he will have to make the appropriate motion to resolve the issue of with or without prejudice on the dismissal. Order granting the summary judgment signed in open court. (302/PA) Hon. PAUL ALVARADO Court Reporter Robert Balian, CSR 5220
